zh.lifeSummary: 當John Drakes於1367年出生在英國越可爾諾曼東時，他的父親Richard Drakes30歲，母親Christian Falos26歲。他於1396年與Margaret Barley在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾德斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1410年在他的家鄉享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: Drakes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Drake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name from Drax (Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English dræg ‘portage, place where boats are dragged’ or dræg ‘drag net’, influenced by Old Norse drag ‘portage’, with a plural drages being shortened to drags, Drax.
In some cases perhaps an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) cognate in some other language.

variants.name: Drake
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English drake, either ‘drake, male duck’ (compare Duck ) or ‘dragon’ (Old English draca ‘snake, dragon’ or the cognate Old Norse draki), including an emblematic dragon on a flag (compare Dragon ). Both the Old English and the Old Norse forms are from Latin draco ‘snake, monster’; its sense as a nickname is unclear but it may have had the sense ‘standard bearer’. The name was taken to Ireland in the 13th century and reinforced by later English settlers in the 17th century.
German: from Low German drake ‘dragon’, familiar as image on signboards, hence a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn with such signboard.
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized and Flemish, of Draak, a cognate of 2 above, from draak (Middle Dutch drake) ‘dragon’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Drakes was born in 1367, in Normanton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Richard Drakes, was 30 and his mother, Christian Falos, was 26. He married Margaret Barley in 1396, in Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1410, in his hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Drakes est né en 1367, à Normanton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard Drakes, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Christian Falos, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Barley en 1396, à Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1410, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Drakesが1367年にイギリスヨークシュアイアノーマントンで生まれた時，父Richard Drakesは30歳，母Christian Falosは26歳であった。1396年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアハッドエルスフィールドでMargaret Barleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1410年に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Drakes(이)가 1367년 영국 요르크실르 노먼턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Drakes(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Falos(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1396년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 허더스필드에서 Margaret Barley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1410년 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Drakes родился в 1367 г. в местности нормантон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Drakes было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Falos, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Barley в 1396 г. в местности худдирсфиелд, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1410 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.
